shops.name: A.C. Perchs Thehandel
shops.description: We have put together a large selection of quality teas from around the world. A. C. Perch Teashop import tea from the best plantations and gardens around the world. You will also find a large selection of accessories for tea, such as; jugs, cups, cakes, jam and chocolate etc. We look forward to provide you with the best products from the world of tea.

shops.name: Banken Hotel
shops.description: Welcome to Banken Hotel, a nice hotel without a reception - right in the center of Haugesund. Here you can stay in pleasant surroundings, whether you are traveling for work, alone or with others. Banken Hotel has made it easy for you with automatic check-in and check-out. You only pay for what you need.

shops.name: Billy Markiser
shops.description: Billy Markiser delivers premium, custom-made awnings and blinds across Norway—direct from factory to home. By cutting out salespeople and middle-men, they offer top-tier materials, tailored dimensions, and stylish fabrics at up to 40 % lower prices. From free fabric samples to a measurement guide and 14-day delivery, Billy makes it simple: measure two dimensions, pick your style, and transform your space. Quality you can trust—guaranteed for 5 years.

shops.name: Bønner i Byen
shops.description: Bønner i Byen is a Bodø-based micro-roastery offering hand-roasted specialty coffee beans sourced via direct trade from around the world. Whether you're a private coffee enthusiast, café, restaurant, or business, they deliver top-quality beans and brewing equipment nationwide, backed by expert guidance and a satisfaction guarantee.

shops.name: Brasilia Bergen
shops.description: Since 2012, Brasilia has been serving the people of Bergen with unforgettable culinary experiences. Brasilia lets you experience authentic Brazilian cuisine, right here in rainy Bergen. We offer a warm and relaxed atmosphere, friendly staff and delicious food of the highest quality. At Brasilia youll get authentic churrasco, the Brazilian way. Choose your own side dishes from our buffet. Sit down and let our gauchos serve you delicious meat. Brazil is closer than you think!

shops.name: Brasilia Bodø
shops.description: Brasilia lets you experience Brazilian inspired cuisine. We offer a warm and relaxed atmosphere, friendly staff and delicious food of the highest quality. Brasilia is a restaurant experience out of the ordinary. Our gauchos will serve you delicious meats, straight from the grill to your table. You choose your own side dishes from our rich buffet.

shops.name: by Benson
shops.description:
by Benson sells products for home and garden. Swedish design.

Durable materials that can be used for a long time and age beautifully. A combination of design, function and quality. Sustainability and care for the environment. Some of the products have been created with passion, knowledge and experience since 1973. We are proud to say that we have the market's best and probably most sold Christmas tree stand. Very stable and adapted for all Christmas trees. The stand hold an enormous amount of water. And it is easy to get the tree stable and at the right angle. In addition, we now also have some of the market's best but also most attractive garden products. The garden collection from by Benson is something we are extremely proud of and very popular worldwide. The hoses are the winner of the Garden product of the year in Sweden.

shops.name: Café Hjemme hos Svigers
shops.description: We are a family oriented cafe and restaurant. The entire interior is mixed antiques from as far back as 1880, and all the interior at our restaurant is for sale. So you can enjoy a lovely dinner while shopping new chairs. Most of our dishes are made from scratch and with the best possible ingredients. We also offer gluten-free and lactose-free food dishes.

shops.name: CBD Nordic
shops.description:
spent when you pay with a card that is linked to your EuroBonus account.

CBD Nordic is a Norwegian-owned company, registered in Norway and with a warehouse in Norway. This means that you can be sure that the goods we sell are legal, customs-cleared and will quickly arrive in your mailbox, without any additional fees. With us, you will always find industry-led products in line with Norway's laws and regulations. When the regulations change, we will also adjust which products we offer. Feel free to send us an email if you have any questions about our products or the legislation surrounding CBD in Norway.

shops.name: CruiseAway
shops.description: Travel Specialist Group was founded in 1992 and specializes in cruises, group and conference trips, and spa trips. Today we have the largest selection of online shipping companies in the Nordic market. Our vision is to create a cruise center where everything is available under the same roof. We want to make it easier to book cruises, so most cruises should be able to book online. That's why we offer the market's most advanced online booking system. The majority of our range can be ordered online on our website around the clock. Of course, you can also send us an email, a chat or call to book a cruise.

shops.name: Ditec Ålesund Bilpleie
shops.description:
Ditec’s philosophy is that even when a car is new, we should try to protect the most vulnerable parts to keep the car in mint condition as long as possible.
Ditec offers services such as rustproofing, lacquer preservation, car wash, tires & rims, repairs, window film & foils, hydrophobic coating treatments, stone chips and many more.
Not all Ditec centers offer the same services. Please visit the Ditec website to see which treatments and services the Ditec center near you offers.

shops.name: Escalon Fløien
shops.description: Escalón at Fløibanen's lower station was Bergen's first tapas restaurant when it opened in 1998. The unique intimate atmosphere you get at Escalón is the place's trademark. The menu has developed a lot since 1998 and new dishes are constantly being added. At the same time, there are some classics Escalón has served for almost 20 years such as meatballs in tomato salsa, crispy bacon dates and fried cheese buns.

shops.name: Escalon Veiten
shops.description: Escalón Veiten is a tapas restaurant in a unique location. Right next to the National Stage and Ole Bulls Plass you will find us in colorful and airy rooms. Large outdoor terrace facing the theater park.

shops.name: Escape Hunt Bergen
shops.description:
Think of Escape Hunt as the closest you’re likely to get to starring in a brilliantly plotted escape movie. You and your teammates get locked in a themed room and have to find and solve a series of clues in order to escape. The pressure’s on, the clock’s ticking, the adrenaline’s pumping. Escape Hunt isn’t something you watch, it’s something you experience – right in the heart of the action. We make you earn your freedom, throwing all manner of devious and dastardly red herrings, dead ends and misdirections your way. It’s completely immersive, utterly addictive and totally entertaining. After Escape Hunt, other entertainment just feels flat.

Please note that you have to book and pay online via www.escapehunt.no/oslo to accrue SAS EuroBonus points.

shops.description:

shops.name: Fangene på Fortet Bergen
shops.description:
when you pay with a linked Visa, Mastercard or Amex card.

Welcome to the Fangene på Fortet in Bergen. We offer 35 different rooms and cells with different tasks to solve together as a team. We recommend 3-5 participants per team, so that you get the most out of the experience. You can come with friends to compete against each other, or other teams that are here. At Fangene på Fortet, you can organize team building as an exciting and fun competition among the employees, or organize a stag party for those who are going to drink. There is a need for all kinds of qualities and talents; physics, knowledge and creativity. We have rooms and cells suitable for everyone - regardless of physical shape and age. It is also very popular to host birthdays with us.
shops.campaign_title: Double points 1st of February to 15th of April

Pay with your linked card and get 100 points per 100 NOK. Escape rooms, challenges and laser tag—seriously fun experiences with double rewards!

shops.name: Far&Sun Solskjerming
shops.description:
Earn EuroBonus Bonus Points when you register your EuroBonus number when making a purchase at Far&Sun Solskjerming.

Far&Sun Solskjerming AS is a solar shading supplier with high competence and experience within the industry. We have a large selection of products, including pleated curtains, slatted curtains, roller blinds and blinds. In addition, we offer traditional curtains, lift curtains and on/off curtains.

Through a free and non-binding inspection, we find the best solution with our customers. As the reliable supplier, we work hard to ensure that all our customers are satisfied with both the products and the service we deliver.

shops.name: Feinschmecker
shops.description: It is the guests who create the atmosphere in Restaurant Feinschmecker. What we do is to make sure that you have a unique experience. With exquisite world-class food, intimate setting and a friendly serving staff we wish you welcome to Restaurant Feinschmecker.

shops.name: Festspillene i Bergen
shops.description:
when buying tickets for the festival on www.fib.no with a payment card that is linked to your EuroBonus membership.

The Bergen International Festival is one of the leading cultural festivals in the Nordic region, held annually in May and June in the city of Bergen. Established in 1953, the festival offers a diverse program of world-class music, theatre, dance, and art. Through both traditional and innovative performances, the festival brings together artists and audiences from around the globe for unforgettable cultural experiences in the heart of Western Norway.

shops.name: Fish Me Fisketorget, Bergen
shops.description: At Fish Me Fisketorget, fresh Norwegian seafood meets the energy of Bergen’s historic fish market. From the daily catch to handcrafted dishes inspired by the ocean, we’re dedicated to delivering authentic flavors, sustainable choices, and a memorable dining experience right by the waterfront.

shops.name: Fish Me, Oslo
shops.description: At Fish Me Oslo, fresh Norwegian seafood meets vibrant city life. From the daily catch to handcrafted dishes inspired by the ocean, we’re dedicated to delivering authentic flavors, sustainable choices, and a memorable dining experience by the waterfront.

shops.name: Fish&Cow
shops.description: A modern brasserie dedicated to fresh cooking. We make classic dishes in a new and fresh way. We serve both fish and cow. But not just that. We serve everything in between these extremes with great excitement and passion. Our primary attention is to the quality of the raw materials and we think that this can be tasted in the dishes we serve.

shops.name: Fiskeriet Bjørvika
shops.description: Fiskeriet connects people and creates memorable food experiences by offering the worlds best seafood in an informal and unique atmosphere. Our employees are experts and passionate about seafood and we are proud to build on a long history and tradition for fish and seafood. With us, you can have something good to eat in the restaurant, or bring the very best seafood home with you.

shops.name: Fiskeriet Youngstorget
shops.description: Fiskeriet connects people and creates memorable food experiences by offering the worlds best seafood in an informal and unique atmosphere. Our employees are experts and passionate about seafood and we are proud to build on a long history and tradition for fish and seafood on Youngstorget. We have both a restaurant and a fish counter in a unique location in the heart of Oslo. With us, you can have something good to eat in the restaurant, or bring the very best seafood home with you.

shops.name: Fjellskål Fisketorget
shops.description: Fjellskål Fisketorget is a combined seafood store and restaurant. Our main focus is to provide the best seafood experience possible, both when buying fish to bring back home to enjoy with your family and when dining in our restaurant only metes away from the sea! We look forward to welcoming you all at Fjellskål Fisketorget

shops.name: Fjellstua
shops.description:
when you pay with a linked Visa, Mastercard or Amex card.

Welcome to Megazone & Fjellstua in Oslo. In the middle of Oslo city center you will find an activity center that offers several different activities. Since 1993, we have had over 3.9 million visitors. Children's birthday parties, stag parties, companies, school classes, sports teams, groups of friends, etc. We offer laser games, indoor paintball, escape games and street curling. At our department Fjellstua we have our own bar and street curling.

shops.name: Frogner House
shops.description:
when booking and paying your stay at www.frognerhouse.no.

Frogner House offers spacious living in apartments and hotels in the central districts of Oslo and Stavanger. Our rooms and apartments are comfortable, homely and fresh. Stay from one night to several months.

Whether you’re traveling with your family or for work, it’s nice to live centrally. Our hotel rooms and apartments are within walking distance of shops, cafes and restaurants.

shops.name: Glød
shops.description:
Glød is Asian cuisine - Redifined

Asian fusion in a world of creation and transformation. Two distinct sections – a bright and lively daytime section and a dark, mysterious evening section – where both spaces represent different phases in the life cycle of fire.

Founded with a passion for culinary perfection, Glød’s journey began in the heart of Trondheim. Robata in the city center is a culinary journey where local ingredients meet Asian techniques, and we carry that same spirit forward to Glød at Teknostallen.

shops.name: Golfamore Norge
shops.description:
"En historie om mye golf!

Vi vil at alle skal få muligheten til å spille mer golf og få mange nye golfopplevelser! Det var derfor vi startet Golfamore i 2005, i løpet av et år da golfen hadde en ganske tøff tid og golfklubbene trengte å nå ut til og tiltrekke seg nye golfere. Golferne hadde på sin side nettopp oppdaget spennende reisesider som åpnet opp en helt ny, rimelig og tilgjengelig verden av opplevelser – og krevde samme type rabatt tilbud for golf også. Siden den gang har vi vokst raskt i både antall brukere, antall deltakende golfklubber og land.

Tilbudet vårt forbedres kontinuerlig, da vi alltid ønsker å tilby golfere det aller beste for en maksimal golfopplevelse. Vi er stolte over å være Europas ledende fordelskort for golfere i dag!"

shops.name: Hästens Store Skøyen
shops.description:
Hästens has a rich history running back through six generations—from our roots as master saddlers to Hästens appointment as Royal Purveyors, and the Spirit of Excellence that drives us forward into the future. The journey to where we are now is one filled with passion, skill and the pursuit of making the best handcrafted beds in the world.

From the day we made our first bed, natural materials have always played a fundamental role. In 1852 cotton, horsetail hair, wool and flax were superior to other materials and, surprisingly, even today... that remains the case. And, then as it is now, the best way to craft using these materials is by hand. This tradition of hand craftsmanship gives our bed makers a deeply-rooted understanding and mastery of both their art, and the natural materials that are so crucial to its consolidation.

Imbuing everything we do with our Spirit of Excellence is still a founding principle that informs the work of our master craftsmen. And to them, there is no other way or standard of working.

Earning SAS EuroBonus Bonus Points on purchase can´t be combined with special discounts or other organized discounts or loyalty programs. Please be aware that SAS EuroBonus Bonus Points earned at this store will be assigned to your account 21 days after the purchase.

shops.name: Helly Hansen
shops.description: Founded in Norway in 1877, Helly Hansen continues to develop their apparel through a blend of Scandinavian design and insights drawn from living among some of the harshest environments on earth. The brand represents the optimal combination of performance, protection and style. Helly Hansen’s progressive designs continue to protect and enable professionals making their living on oceans and mountains around the world.

shops.name: Hulténs Norge
shops.description:
We at Hulténs have a long history of entrepreneurship. Our story began when our grandfather in the 1970s sold his own furniture on a square in a village outside Örkelljunga in Sweden. He established himself with self-produced furniture, while we grandchildren learned everything about the furniture industry. Together we, Anders and Krister Hultén, took the idea further, and in 1984 we started selling furniture in a parking lot in Staffanstorp. Gradually we grew, and we needed bigger warehouses, and in 1997 our shop opened in Staffanstorp.

We now also have webshops serving happy customers in Sweden, Norway, Denmark and Finland.

shops.name: Hurtigruta Carglass Alnabru
shops.description:
Have your car gotten a glass damage? Save money and time by having it repaired by Carglass and earn EuroBonus points on your repair.

Regardless of which car youve got, Carglass can help you. They are specialized in glass damages and can repair stone chips as well as replacing all types of car windows and windscreens. If you have got a damaged glass, Carglass always recommend you to get it repaired. If you do nothing, your window might crack, and you will have to spend money on replacing the entire window. Replacing a window instead of repairing it, is also bad for the environment. At Carglass you can choose among one of the many nationwide repair shops, or you can book Carglass to come to you to save time.

shops.name: Johnny Rockets Sandvika
shops.description: Step into the world of Johnny Rockets, where the spirit of classic American diners meets Norwegian charm. Famous for our juicy burgers, creamy hand-spun shakes, and retro vibes, we’re all about serving up smiles and great times. Whether you're craving comfort food or a trip down memory lane, Johnny Rockets is your go-to spot for good vibes and even better eats. Come for the food, stay for the fun.

shops.name: Kafe Asylet
shops.description: Kafé Asylet is a rustic restaurant with wood-paneled walls, where you can enjoy classic Norwegian dishes.

shops.name: Luxreaders.no
shops.description:
Luxreaders is a Danish company with roots in Copenhagen. The company is founded with the ambition to make it quick, convenient and fun to buy quality reading glasses. Therefore, Luxreaders have designed some quality glasses at an affordable price and launched an online platform that make it possible to try their glasses on your own through augmented reality.

Remember to type in your 9-digit EuroBonus membership number, when you buy glasses at Luxreaders to earn EuroBonus Bonus Points. You cannot retro-claim points from Luxreaders if you did not type in your 9-digit membership number on the check-out page before payment. To earn EuroBonus Bonus Points, simply type in your 9-digit SAS EuroBonus Membership number upon check-out before you pay.

shops.name: Megazone
shops.description:
when you pay with a linked Visa, Mastercard or Amex card.

Welcome to Megazone & Fjellstua in Oslo. In the middle of Oslo city center you will find an activity center that offers several different activities. Since 1993, we have had over 3.9 million visitors. Children's birthday parties, stag parties, companies, school classes, sports teams, groups of friends, etc. We offer laser games, indoor paintball, escape games and street curling. At our department Fjellstua we have our own bar and street curling.
shops.campaign_title: Double points 1st of February to 15th of April
shops.campaign_description: From 1 Feb–15 April 2026 you earn double EuroBonus points at Fangene på Fortet in Oslo, Bergen and Stavanger, and at Megazone in Oslo. Pay with your linked card and get 100 points per 100 NOK. Escape rooms, challenges and laser tag—seriously fun experiences with double rewards!

shops.name: Mellom
shops.description:
Mellom - A home away from home.

In collaboration with some of Scandinavia’s best menu developers and Teknostallen’s culinary selection, we’ve created a menu that covers whatever you’re in the mood for.

The goal is to create a ‘third place’ – a space for social gatherings, relaxation, and good conversations. The term was introduced by sociologist Ray Oldenburg and refers to places we seek out between home and work. Here, we can unwind, exchange ideas, and build connections.

People long for a third place – a kind of second home, where one can unwind after work, meet people, and recharge before everyday life calls again. It’s where relationships are built and energy is restored.

shops.name: Morris Amfi Moa Nord
shops.description: At Morris we offer a large selection of bags, suitcases gloves, backpacks and accessories for everyone. No matter if you are going to travel around the world, take the car into the countryside or want to compliment your clothes with an elegant piece, we are the place to go. At Morris you will find large as well as small suitcases, bags and backpacks for many different needs and looks. It is important to us that our assortment is one of quality, functionality and varied design. That is why we offer suitcases, bags and backpacks in all styles and price ranges from well-known and classical brands.

No matter if you are going to travel around the world, take the car into the countryside or want to compliment your clothes with an elegant piece, we are the place to go. At Morris you will find large as well as small suitcases, bags and backpacks for many different needs and looks. It is important to us that our assortment is one of quality, functionality and varied design. That is why we offer suitcases, bags and backpacks in all styles and price ranges from well-known and classical brands.

Myscreens is a Nordic group that sells sun shading and high-quality curtains throughout Norway, Sweden and Denmark. Our products are easy to assemble with our digital assembly instructions. Our head office is located in the Paris of the Nordics, Tromsø in Norway.

shops.name: Nikita Bergen Lagunen Storsenter 3. etg
shops.description: Nikita Hair is the Nordic region's largest and leading hairdressing chain. Through 30 years of doing hair, we have had several million customer visits, and our skilled hairdressers all over the country are ready every day with scissors, combs and good advice to give you "a great feeling!" In 1984, Elton John's super hit "Nikita" ravaged the radio stations in Norway, and he is thus considered the godfather of the hairy adventure that started with a single hairdressing salon in the town of Tverlandet, outside Bodø. Nikita Hair's founder, Inger Ellen Nicolaisen, has with courage, enthusiasm and passion for building people created history's greatest adventure in Hair & Beauty.

shops.name: Nordisk Ventilasjonsrens
shops.description:
Earn 50 EuroBonus Bonus Points when quoting your EuroBonus number upon purchase.

Nordisk Ventilasjonsrens (nVent) is a leading Norwegian company specializing in comprehensive ventilation system cleaning and maintenance. With a commitment to enhancing indoor air quality and ensuring optimal system performance, nVent offers tailored solutions for both residential and commercial clients. Their team of certified professionals utilizes state-of-the-art equipment and adheres to industry best practices, ensuring thorough and efficient service. By choosing nVent, clients benefit from improved energy efficiency, extended system lifespan, and a healthier living or working environment. Trust nVent to deliver exceptional service and expertise in maintaining the cleanliness and functionality of your ventilation systems.

Earned points will be transferred to your EuroBonus account between 3 and 40 days after the purchase depending on the type of merchant. If you return the product, accrued points will be deducted.

shops.name: Nordvik Eiendomsmegler
shops.description:
Earn 25.000 EuroBonus points when you list your home with Nordvik Eiendomsmegler.

Nordvik Eiendomsmegler is your trusted partner for buying, selling, and valuing homes across Norway. With nearly 40 local offices and expert agents, they combine deep market knowledge, modern digital tools and a commitment to trust and transparency. Nordvik is a trusted and reliable choice for anyone looking to sell their home – guiding you safely through every step of the process.

shops.name: Norfloor Bergen
shops.description: Norfloor has been since its inception, 39 years ago, a leading player in the Norwegian tile distribution market, which has historically been the core business of the company. In recent years the company has grown in size and widened its range with new product categories in order to offer to its retail and professional costumers even a better shopping experience and are now able to deliver a complete range in the tile, bathroom furniture and building materials market.

shops.name: Norsk Familieøkonomi
shops.description:
Earn 1 000 EuroBonus points when you sign up for a Premium membership.

Norsk Familieøkonomi helps families take control of their everyday finances with simple, practical guidance you can trust. As a Premium member, you get access to exclusive tools and advice designed to create security, balance, and long-term financial confidence. Premium also includes a comprehensive cancer insurance that provides financial support if the unexpected happens—giving you and your family extra peace of mind.

shops.name: Norsk Luftfartsmuseum
shops.description:
Norsk Luftfartsmuseum is the Norwegian national museum of aviation.

The museum is located in Bodø in the North of Norway in a building shaped like a giant propeller, and covers military and civil aviation history. The museum is spread over roughly 10,000 square metres of floor space.

The exhibitions at the museum are the result of a co-operation between Norsk Luftfartsmuseum, the Norwegian Air Force Museum and the AVINOR Museum.

The museum was opened in 1994.

shops.name: Onkel Oskar Mo i Rana
shops.description: Velkommen til Onkel Oskar Mo i Rana! Bar med klassisk engelsk særpreg i sentrum av Mo i Rana med stort utvalg i whisky, cognac og øl. Servering av småretter. Visning av fotball. Dart. Åpner tidlig på ettermiddagen.

OptiTuning is a leading Norwegian provider of custom engine optimization and tuning services for cars, trucks, boats, agricultural, and construction machinery. Since 2011, we’ve delivered tailored ECU remapping using in-house developed software, helping customers unlock more power, better fuel efficiency, and a smoother driving experience. With nationwide coverage and mobile service, OptiTuning brings professional vehicle tuning directly to your door—always with a focus on safety, quality, and customer satisfaction.

shops.name: Ortopedbutikken.no
shops.description:
At Ortopedbutiken, your comfort and mobility come first. We offer carefully selected orthopedic products designed to support your body, relieve pain, and improve your everyday life — whether you’re recovering from an injury, managing chronic discomfort, or simply looking for better support.

Our range includes braces, supports, insoles, compression products, and other orthopedic aids chosen with quality, function, and comfort in mind. We work to make it easy for you to find the right solution, with clear information and reliable products you can trust.

We believe that the right support can make a real difference — helping you move more freely, live more actively, and feel better every day.

Whether you're hosting a private party, wedding, or corporate gathering, we offer reliable equipment and easy booking to ensure a great atmosphere. With professional service and top-tier gear, we help make your event sound and look its best—wherever you are.

shops.name: PremiumProtein
shops.description: Premiumprotein.no is a Norwegian online store offering a wide selection of protein products and nutritional supplements for an active and healthy lifestyle. With a focus on quality, taste, and nutrition, Premium Protein provides everything from protein bars and shakes to meal replacements and vitamins. Whether you're training with a goal in mind or simply need a convenient snack, you'll find products that suit your everyday needs. The store partners with well-known brands and offers fast delivery across Norway.

shops.name: QOMO
shops.description:
QOMO is a fusion-concept, a retailer of menswear, womenswear and lifestyle products. Our selection is carefully curated and our vision is to offer the modern consumer a unique assortment and everyday products that are made to last.

The QOMO-concept is more than a curated lifestyle-retailer, we strive to engage with our costumers and want to create a culture around our store. We have done an official festival collaboration, several DJ-sets and countless concerts in-store. QOMO is a vibrant, unique store at the top of Oslo's biggest pedestrian street, starting at Gründerløkka, leading all the way into the city center.

Our selection is highly centred around Scandinavian fashion and we are already retailing brands such as Ganni, Tom Wood, Rodebjer, Libertine Libertine, Samsøe & Wood Wood + many more.

shops.name: Rituals Aker Brygge
shops.description: Rituals believe happiness can be found in the smallest of things. But all too often our lives are so busy that we forget to enjoy the moment. Rituals mission is to encourage you to slow down once in a while. Inspired by ancient Eastern traditions and with fragrances created by the finest perfumers, Rituals products help you to transform your daily routines like taking a shower, soaking in a warm bath and lighting a candle into more meaningful Rituals.

shops.name: Royal Caribbean Cruises
shops.description:
Royal Caribbean International is known for driving innovation at sea and has continuously redefined cruise vacationing since its launch in 1969. Each successive class of ships is an architectural marvel and pushes the envelope of what is possible on a cruise ship. Onboard, the global cruise line has debuted countless industry “firsts” – such as rock climbing, ice skating and surfing at sea – to capture the imagination of families and adventurous vacationers alike. Throughout, guests sail on exciting itineraries to some of the world’s most popular destinations and enjoy Royal Caribbean’s friendly and engaging service.

Note: You will only earn EuroBonus Bonus Points on your cruise when you make the booking via this specific link https://erbjudande.royalcaribbean.se/sas and register your EuroBonus number at the time of booking. It is not possible to retro-register the EuroBonus number. To earn EuroBonus Bonus points, simply complete your booking via the special link provided below and type in your 9-digit SAS EuroBonus number during the purchase process.

shops.name: Sanna
shops.description:
Sanna is a forward-thinking accounting service that takes the stress out of bookkeeping for holding companies and entrepreneurs. By combining professional expertise with a modern digital platform, Sanna handles your company’s accounting, reporting, tax filings, and compliance — so you can stay focused on building your business.

Designed specifically for founders and small business owners, Sanna offers a full-service solution where your accounts are managed by authorized professionals at a transparent, all-inclusive price. With seamless bank integration and dedicated support, Sanna delivers peace of mind and clarity around financials, deadlines, and statutory requirements.

Whether you’re just launching a holding company or looking to simplify your existing accounts, Sanna makes professional bookkeeping accessible and straightforward — freeing you from spreadsheets, software complexity, and compliance headaches.

shops.name: Sayso by Nikita Bergen Åsane Horisont
shops.description: Nikita Hair is the Nordic region's largest and leading hairdressing chain. Through 30 years of doing hair, we have had several million customer visits, and our skilled hairdressers all over the country are ready every day with scissors, combs and good advice to give you "a great feeling!" In 1984, Elton John's super hit "Nikita" ravaged the radio stations in Norway, and he is thus considered the godfather of the hairy adventure that started with a single hairdressing salon in the town of Tverlandet, outside Bodø. Nikita Hair's founder, Inger Ellen Nicolaisen, has with courage, enthusiasm and passion for building people created history's greatest adventure in Hair & Beauty.

shops.name: Smarthotel Bodø
shops.description:
At Smarthotel we strive to offer the lowest price levels in our segment. You will always find the best rate at www.smarthotel.no.

All our Smarthotels have great beds. The DUX brand provides us with the highest quality beds on the market. When we made the change to DUX, we conducted a blind test amongst our most loyal guests. The results were unanimously in favour of DUX.

We are working for a world where the environment is protected and human rights are fulfilled. Our specific focus is the intersection of these two global concerns. Our main arena is the tropical rainforest of the world. Our mission: To support indigenous peoples and traditional populations of the world's rainforests in their efforts to protect their environment and fulfill their rights by assisting them.

Welcome to Tiger Sushi Bar – Bodø’s Premier Sushi Destination.

Located in the heart of Bodø, Tiger Sushi Bar invites you to experience a fresh and modern take on traditional Japanese cuisine. With a focus on high-quality ingredients, bold flavors, and creative presentation, our chefs craft sushi that both honors tradition and embraces innovation.

Whether you're stopping by for a quick lunch, a cozy dinner, or takeaway on the go, Tiger Sushi Bar offers something for every palate – from classic nigiri and sashimi to exciting signature rolls and flavorful hot dishes.

Relax in our stylish, inviting atmosphere and enjoy the taste of Japan right here in Northern Norway. Welcome to Tiger Sushi Bar – where great taste meets great vibes.

shops.name: Von Doren
shops.description: Norwegian brand Von Doren creates distinctive, high-quality timepieces with a touch of vintage flair. The company, established in 2016, takes much of its inspiration from the magnificent nature that surrounds Aalesund. The port town, which lies on the West coast of Norway, is surrounded by breathtaking fjords, mountains and waterfalls. It is also renowned for its unique Art Nouveau architecture, with its elegant lines and stone buildings influenced by American architecture and national romantic details.

shops.name: Vulkanfisk
shops.description:
Welcome at Vulkanfisk sea food restaurant. We are located in Mathallen Oslo and seats up to 90 guests. We love great sea food, and we know the story behind all of our raw materials. Our suppliers are just as passionate about the treasures of the ocean as we are - and we hope that our guests can taste this.

Welcome!

shops.name: Wolt Norge
shops.description: Wolt makes it incredibly easy for you to discover and get what you want. Delivered to you – quickly, reliably and affordably. And by doing so, we make cities better places to live. We're present in most Norwegian cities (15 as of September 2022) and we continue to add new cities regularly.

shops.name: Chillout
shops.description:
Chillout Travel Store - Biggest and best on travel equipment!

At Chillout we aim be the best specialty store for travel equipment. We want to be the natural first choice for anyone who loves to travel.

We have three key areas which are important to us to reach our goal to become the very best travel store:

- We want you to experience excellent customer service when visiting our stores. Our staff will do whatever they can to help you find the best travel equipment for your trip, and perhaps share a store or two which can inspire you to go and experience more of the world.

- We aim to show great knowledge within our specialty, and to know what you need and why. Our staff is experienced in many types of travel, so they will be able to help you whether you are going for a safari, horseback riding, backpacking or another adventure.

- We would like you to feel inspired to travel the world when visiting Chillout. Use our cafes to browse through our travel magazines, guidebooks or maps and chat with many of our globetrotters!

shops.name: Sayso by Nikita Bergen Åsane Horisont
shops.description:
Nikita Hair is the Nordic region's largest and leading hairdressing chain. Through 30 years of doing hair, we have had several million customer visits, and our skilled hairdressers all over the country are ready every day with scissors, combs and good advice to give you "a great feeling!" In 1984, Elton John's super hit "Nikita" ravaged the radio stations in Norway, and he is thus considered the godfather of the hairy adventure that started with a single hairdressing salon in the town of Tverlandet, outside Bodø.

Nikita Hair's founder, Inger Ellen Nicolaisen, has with courage, enthusiasm and passion for building people created history's greatest adventure in Hair & Beauty.
